items.title: Signed Windows installer
items.detail: Authenticode-sign the desktop setup.exe — Windows leaves the notify-me gate when it ships.

items.title: Multi-window desktop chat
items.detail: "Open in New Window" spawns a real second desktop window with its own chat surface.

items.title: Federation token follow-ups
items.detail: management UI, peer rotation, and fleet integration for ADR 0066 tokens.

items.title: Backend-agnostic tracing
items.detail: generic OTLP / OpenInference trace export instead of hard-coding the Langfuse SDK.

items.title: Ollama & Hugging Face listings
items.detail: register protoAgent as an Ollama community integration and a Hugging Face "Use this model" local app.

items.title: Plugin Python deps in the desktop app
items.detail: opt-in install of a plugin's requires_pip packages inside the frozen desktop build: pure-Python wheels onto the host path, or into the managed Python runtime that also gives the desktop app a working execute_code.

items.title: Production traces → training flywheel
items.detail: per-turn trajectory export from production agents into the lab for downstream training-data collection.

items.title: Autonomous operating model
items.detail: goals, tasks, scheduling, and watches compose into one self-directed OODA loop, with durable task→goal attribution.

items.title: Media platform
items.detail: plugin tools save generated images/audio/video the chat renders inline (signed URLs, bearer-safe), and can return images a vision model actually sees.

items.title: Fleet trace export
items.detail: opt-in per-turn trajectory rows (OpenAI chat format + verifiable reward) with a PII-redacting sync pipeline.

items.title: Migrate from Hermes or OpenClaw
items.detail: import scripts that carry an existing agent's config, memory, and history into protoAgent.

items.title: Rewind a chat thread
items.detail: jump a conversation back to an earlier message and branch from there.

items.title: Plugin management from the rail
items.detail: installed version, "update if available", and uninstall — from the rail context menu and a settings panel.

items.title: One-command install
items.detail: a curl | sh bootstrap with an interactive CLI config wizard.
